title: Manage machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Evaluate machinery and equipment usage

pcs.text: Review and match operations of available machinery and equipment to production processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and match operations of available machinery and equipment to production processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and match operations of available machinery and equipment to production processes.

pcs.text: Calculate operation and servicing costs of machinery and equipment to determine total purchasing price
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate operation and servicing costs of machinery and equipment to determine total purchasing price?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate operation and servicing costs of machinery and equipment to determine total purchasing price.

pcs.text: Estimate productivity returns from machinery and equipment to identify benefit to production processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate productivity returns from machinery and equipment to identify benefit to production processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate productivity returns from machinery and equipment to identify benefit to production processes.

pcs.text: Monitor machinery and equipment replacement cycles to identify improvement options and maximise the life cycle of components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor machinery and equipment replacement cycles to identify improvement options and maximise the life cycle of components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor machinery and equipment replacement cycles to identify improvement options and maximise the life cycle of components.

pcs.text: Acquire machinery and equipment through appropriate procurement options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acquire machinery and equipment through appropriate procurement options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acquire machinery and equipment through appropriate procurement options.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Evaluate machinery and equipment usage

elements.title: Coordinate machinery and equipment maintenance

pcs.text: Identify and schedule maintenance and service cycles to ensure servicing is according to manufacturer specifications and production processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and schedule maintenance and service cycles to ensure servicing is according to manufacturer specifications and production processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and schedule maintenance and service cycles to ensure servicing is according to manufacturer specifications and production processes.

pcs.text: Cost and arrange storing and housing of machinery and equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cost and arrange storing and housing of machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Document and record operational and service history
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and record operational and service history?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and record operational and service history.

pcs.text: Identify and assess risks and hazards to health and safety in the workplace and review and record risk controls

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess risks and hazards to health and safety in the workplace and review and record risk controls.

pcs.text: Provide, maintain and store suitable personal protective equipment according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide, maintain and store suitable personal protective equipment according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide, maintain and store suitable personal protective equipment according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Develop and monitor repair and maintenance routines according to manufacturer specifications and workplace health and safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and monitor repair and maintenance routines according to manufacturer specifications and workplace health and safety procedures.

elements.title: Monitor operation

pcs.text: Make available for use, maintain and dispose of consumables and operational support materials according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make available for use, maintain and dispose of consumables and operational support materials according to workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor adherence to health and safety in the workplace and environmental practices according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor adherence to health and safety in the workplace and environmental practices according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure operational procedures are clear, documented and followed according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Provide operators with instructions and supervision according to health and safety standards and efficient workplace practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide operators with instructions and supervision according to health and safety standards and efficient workplace practices.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
